since_last: 41% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.86%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.24% · BTC +2.86% · Gold -0.14% · Nasdaq100 -0.14%. 41% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.86%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.86%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.39%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +14.06%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +14.06%, MU +5.10%, INTC +4.67%, DELL +4.63%, ZBRA +4.05%. Laggards: SPCX -9.01%, AVAV -8.10%, GOOGL -6.42%, ARM -5.96%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -9.01% at $168.32
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -9.01% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
